name: St. Patrick's Day Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Green creme de menthe; OR...
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine marshmallows and milk. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until marshmallows are melted and mixture is smooth.
2. Into a small bowl, pour 1 cup of the marshmallow mixture. Stir in creme de menthe; set aside.
3. Add chocolate chips and powdered sugar to the remaining marshmallow mixture in the saucepan. Return the saucepan to low heat; stir constantly until chips are melted. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
4. In a large bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff; fold 1-1/2 cups into mint mixture. Fold the remaining whipped cream into chocolate mixture. Alternately spoon chocolate and mint mixtures into parfait glasses. Refrigerate until cold or place in freezer until firm. Garnish as desired. Makes 6 servings.
5. PEPPERMINT VARIATION: Substitute 2 tablespoons crushed hard peppermint candy and 1 to 2 drops red food color, if desired, for liqueur or mint extract and green food color. Garnish with chocolate curls, if desired.
